title: Date & Time
description: Calendar abstraction and date/time utilities for AcoreX. Supports Gregorian and Solar Hijri calendars, locale-aware formatting, holiday loading, date arithmetic, comparison, ranges, and registered formatters integrated with AXFormatService.
imports: import { AXCalendarService, AXDateTime, AXDateValue, AXDateTimeRange } from '@acorex/core/date-time';
import { AXDateFormatter, AXDateTimeFormatter, AXTimeFormatter, AXTimeDurationFormatter, AXTimeLeftFormatter } from '@acorex/core/date-time';

hints.title: Calendar systems
hints.content: Two built-in calendars are registered by default: gregorian and solar-hijri. Switch at runtime with setActiveCalendar() or automatically via locale profile changes from AXLocaleService.

hints.title: Preferred formatting
hints.content: Use AXFormatService or the format pipe from @acorex/core/format for display. Import AXDateTimeModule to register date/time formatters. The axDate pipe is deprecated.

hints.title: Internal Date storage
hints.content: AXDateTime always wraps a native Date internally. Calendar-specific year/month/day are computed through the active AXCalendar implementation — the same instant can be displayed in Gregorian or Solar Hijri.

types.title: AXCalendarService
types.description: Central service for creating, converting, formatting, and managing the active calendar.

props.name: calendarChanges$
props.description: Emits when the active calendar changes.

props.name: onHolidaysChanged
props.description: Notifies subscribers when holidays are reloaded.

methods.content: create(value: AXDateValue | Date | string | AXDateTime, calendarName?: string): AXDateTime
format(value: AXValidDateTimeValue, format: string, options?: AXDateTimeFormatterOptions): string

props.name: dayOfMonth
props.description: Day of month in the active calendar.

methods.content: format(format?: string, options?: { locale?: string }): string
compare(value: Date | AXDateTime, unit?: TimeUnit): number
isBefore(value: Date | AXDateTime, unit?: TimeUnit): boolean
isAfter(value: Date | AXDateTime, unit?: TimeUnit): boolean
isSame(value: Date | AXDateTime, unit?: TimeUnit): boolean

types.title: AXDateTimeRange
types.description: Represents a start/end pair of AXDateTime values with duration and enumeration helpers.

types.title: TimeUnit
types.description: Supported units for add, set, startOf, endOf, and compare.

methods.content: add(date: Date, unit: TimeUnit, amount: number): AXDateTime

content.data:
The date-time module wraps JavaScript Date with calendar-aware logic. AXCalendarService is the main entry point — it creates AXDateTime instances, switches between gregorian and solar-hijri calendars, formats values, and loads holidays.

AXDateTime provides immutable-style operations (add, startOf, compare) that return new instances. Formatters register with AXFormatService through AXDateTimeModule, enabling the format pipe in templates.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: AXCalendarService is providedIn root — inject it to create, format, and manipulate calendar-aware dates.

sections.title: Module Setup
sections.description: Register formatters and the axDate pipe.

sections.title: Creating Dates
sections.description: Create AXDateTime from Date, string, AXDateValue, or calendar parts.

sections.title: Switching Calendars
sections.description: Change the active calendar and react to changes.

sections.title: Date Arithmetic & Comparison
sections.description: Add time, get boundaries, and compare dates.

sections.title: Formatting
sections.description: Format dates via AXCalendarService, formatters, or the format pipe.

sections.title: Format Tokens
sections.description: Common pattern tokens supported by AXDateTime.format().

sections.title: Duration & Time Left
sections.description: Format elapsed time and relative countdowns.

sections.title: Solar Hijri Calendar
sections.description: Direct use of AXSolarHijriCalendar for conversion and validation.

sections.title: Holidays Loader
sections.description: Provide a custom holidays loader and consume holidays in components.

sections.title: axDate Pipe (Deprecated)
sections.description: Legacy pipe — prefer the format pipe instead.

data.content:
{{ today | axDate: 'yyyy/MM/dd' : 'solar-hijri' }}

{{ today | format: 'datetime' : { format: 'yyyy/MM/dd', calendar: 'solar-hijri' } | async }}
